title: NIIT is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: NIIT is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
